case_title: MARTHA MENBRENO ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTIMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM - CIVIL [X] EX PARTE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENBRENO, MARTHA GUARDIAN FOR LINDA GARCIA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MENBRENO, MARTHA GUARDIAN FOR LINDA GARCIA GARCIA, LINDA JAZMIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENBRENO, MARTHA GUARDIAN FOR LINDA GARCIA GARCIA, LINDA JAZMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, MEDICAL $5633, PAIN AND SUFFERING $3000, TOTAL $8633. MARTHA MEMBRENO LOST WORK $75, GENERAL DAMAGES $1292. SEE STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTIMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM - CIVIL [X] EX PARTE - ORDER [X] EX PARTE - GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-12-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARTHA MENBRENO IS PRESENT (ASSISTED BY JUANITA ULLOA FOR PRETRIAL EXPLANATION ONLY). PLAINTIFF LINDA GARCIA IS PRESENT VIA MARTHA MENBRENO AD LITEM. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH MILLER CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MARTHA MENBRENO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACTED SPANISH INTERPRETER CERTIFIED CHI 006865 THILO I ULLMANN-ZAHN. MR. ULLMANN-ZHAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF LINDA JAZMIN GARCIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MARTHA MENBRENO. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF: MR. GARCIA, FATHER. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH J. MILLER, THIRD PARTY CLAIM ADMINISTRATOR. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT CALLED ON PHONE: MARIA CERVANTES, SPECIAL ED TEACHER WHO DISCOVERED THE PLAINTIFF'S INJURY. PLAINTIFF(S) AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
